Create Custom Antique Store Banners for Retail & Storefront Advertising

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your antique store's visibility with eye-catching custom vinyl banners designed specifically for retail and storefront advertising. From grand openings and seasonal sales to daily promotions and special events, our professionally crafted antique store banners help improve your storefront visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with potential customers and collectors.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver an antique store banner that you're proud to display. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your retail advertising vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of the vinyl banner industry and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive a tailor-made antique store banner.

We offer a wide selection of custom antique store banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and you can even choose production time to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for your antique store marketing campaigns.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your antique store banner project.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders for antique store chains.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Material for Professional Antique Store Displays

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your antique store banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your antique store branding. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your antique store banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material for antique store displays. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for professional storefront advertising.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give your antique store banner a high-end look.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for antique store outdoor displays. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor antique store advertising in windy conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor antique store displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for antique store window displays, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces for specialized antique store applications.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Finishing Options for Antique Store Banner Installation

Antique Store Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet for secure antique store banner mounting. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for long-term outdoor display. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners for professional antique store installations. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for support in storefront banner displays.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all antique store banners to increase durability for storefront use.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your antique store banner:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the antique store banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your antique store banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the antique store banner for professional installation.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner for long-term antique store outdoor advertising.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided antique store banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Antique Store Banner Artwork Requirements for Quality Printing

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best for antique store banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you with your antique store banner artwork.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your antique store banner order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your antique store banner project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Antique Store Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for your antique store banner projects. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your antique store banner.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight for antique store promotions. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your antique store banners quickly? The express option is ideal.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for antique store banners. Free and speedy for most custom orders.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush for your antique store banner, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

Antique Store Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Payment

All antique store banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your antique store banner order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your antique store banner order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Antique Store Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping your antique store banner, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your antique store banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large antique store banner orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the antique store banner product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for antique store banners:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping for your antique store banner, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

Professional & Event Uses for Antique Store Banners

We print thousands of antique store banners each year. If you need inspiration for designing your banner, explore some popular ways below for how our customers use antique store banners.

Business and Retail

  • Grand opening announcements for new antique shops
  • Storefront advertising for antique dealers
  • Seasonal sales and clearance events

Events and Trade Shows

  • Antique show booth backdrops
  • Collector fair sponsor recognition banners
  • Estate sale promotional banners

Outdoor and Public Use

  • Antique festivals and fairs
  • Street-pole banners for antique districts
  • Community antique walk events

Construction and Real Estate

  • Historic building restoration announcements
  • "Coming Soon" antique shop openings
  • Vintage property "For Sale" banners

Education and Museums

  • Historical society event banners
  • Museum exhibit promotional signage
  • Educational antique workshops

Specialty and Collector Events

  • Vintage car show announcements
  • Collectible toy fair signage
  • Antique furniture showcase banners

Nonprofit and Community

  • Historical preservation fundraising
  • Heritage awareness campaigns
  • Community restoration projects

Personal and Celebratory

  • Vintage-themed birthday banners
  • Historic anniversary celebrations
  • Antique-style wedding welcome signage

Hospitality and Food Service

  • Vintage restaurant grand opening banners
  • Antique-themed café promotions
  • Historic venue event announcements

Order Custom Antique Store Banners for Your Business Today

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color antique store banners take your retail advertising to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and outdoor durability perfect for antique shop storefront displays.

Custom Antique Store Banners - Great for Antique Shops, Consignment Shops and Collectors

Full color vinyl banners are a low cost option for high quality advertising. Use a banner to advertise your antique store - they can help draw in tourists and local customers. Banners can be used indoors or outdoors for advertising sales and promotions. You can also let people know your business hours and contact information.

Antique Store Banners are printed on 13 oz scrim vinyl. Banners are printed in full color - you can add unlimited text, clipart, backgrounds and photographs. Production time for vinyl banners is 1-2 business days after payment has been received. All banners are shipped via UPS.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

FAQ

What materials work best for outdoor antique store banners?

For outdoor antique store displays, we recommend our 18 oz heavy-duty vinyl or mesh banners for windy conditions. Both materials are weather-resistant and designed for long-term outdoor use.

Can I get custom sizes for my antique store banner?

Yes, we offer custom sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50'. For larger sizes or unique dimensions, contact our customer service team for a custom quote.

How long will my antique store banner last outdoors?

Our vinyl banners are designed for outdoor durability. With proper installation and care, they can last 2-3 years outdoors, depending on weather conditions and material choice.

What file formats do you accept for antique store banner artwork?

We accept .eps (converted to outline), high-resolution .pdf, and .jpg files. Our graphic design team can help optimize your artwork for the best printing results.

Do you offer design services for antique store banners?

Yes, we have a team of professional graphic designers who can create custom antique store banners. Simply select "Let us Design" when placing your order and provide your requirements.

What finishing options work best for storefront banner installation?

For storefront installations, we recommend hems and grommets for easy hanging, or pole pockets if you plan to use a mounting system with poles or rods.
